query: SELECT TIME(deliveryDate) as time_part, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM orders WHERE orderNumber LIKE 'QB-%' OR orderNumber LIKE 'CM-%' OR orderNumber LIKE 'SR-%' OR orderNumber LIKE 'DEP-%' GROUP BY TIME(deliveryDate) ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.d2c4bdf1aaee --database X4Qkp2kKx9JEdEZTkB9mBy --execute SELECT TIME(deliveryDate) as time_part, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM orders WHERE orderNumber LIKE 'QB-%' OR orderNumber LIKE 'CM-%' OR orderNumber LIKE 'SR-%' OR orderNumber LIKE 'DEP-%' GROUP BY TIME(deliveryDate) ORDER BY cnt DESC;
